What We Do

Our Core Services

From chemical supply to sustainable waste management, we cover the full spectrum of industrial chemical needs.

Supply

Chemical Supply

Specialty and industrial chemicals for mining, agriculture, water treatment, and manufacturing sectors.

Learn More
Sustainable

Waste-to-Energy

Converting waste streams into viable energy alternatives, driving circular economy outcomes for your operation.

Learn More
ESG

ESG Waste Oil

Certified waste oil collection and documentation ensuring full ESG compliance for your sustainability reporting.

Learn More
Management

Waste Management

End-to-end waste management from logistics and collection through to responsible disposal and reporting.

Learn More
About Apex Chemicals

A Partner You Can Trust

Welcome to Apex Chemicals — your trusted partner in the world of industrial and specialty chemicals. Established with a commitment to innovation, quality, and sustainability, we are a leading provider of a diverse range of chemical products including oleo-chemicals, water treatment chemicals, and more.

  • State-of-the-art manufacturing and storage facility
  • Strict quality control exceeding industry standards
  • Dedicated ESG sustainability programme
  • Expert technical support and logistics team
About Us
Why Apex

Why Choose Us

Built on decades of expertise and a relentless commitment to quality, safety, and sustainability.

Quality Assurance

Our facilities adhere to strict quality control standards with advanced testing at every production step.

Sustainability Focus

Dedicated to reducing environmental footprint through green technology investment and responsible resource use.

Expert Team

Decades of chemical industry expertise. Our specialists provide technical guidance and customised solutions.

Fast Delivery

Reliable logistics network ensuring timely deliveries across KwaZulu-Natal and nationally.

Competitive Pricing

Equitable market rates with transparent pricing. We help your business stay cost-effective.

ESG Compliance

Full ESG documentation and certification support, helping you meet sustainability reporting obligations.
